design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate side-scrolling levels as Simba, jumping on enemies and solving puzzles in cub form, then transitioning to adult combat-focused gameplay with scratching, mauling, and throws
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Traversal hazards (bottomless pits, lava, water, rolling boulders, falling stalactites) combined with enemy encounters; resource management of health and roar meter
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Experience Simba's journey from vulnerable cub to powerful adult lion, paralleling the film's narrative arc of growth and destiny
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Intentional difficulty spike in mid-development (monkey puzzle in level 2 expanded to meet Disney's playtime criteria for fighting game rentals); uses checkpoint system to gate progression rather than pure skill-gating

difficulty.lives_system: Variable starting lives dependent on difficulty setting; lost on health depletion, falling into hazards (pits, water, lava), or collision with environmental hazards (boulders, stalactites)
difficulty.continues_system: Circle of Life icons scattered throughout stages grant continues; if player loses all lives and has continues remaining, they restart from beginning of last stage reached; otherwise return to title screen
difficulty.checkpointing: Checkpoints placed throughout levels allow restart from that point upon losing a life, preserving forward progress within a stage
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Difficulty setting controls starting lives; players can extend health and roar meters permanently by collecting specific rare bugs; bonus stages with Timon and Pumbaa provide extra lives and continues, allowing skilled players to build resource buffers

progression.upgrade_system: Permanent meter extensions (health and roar) via rare bug collection; temporary roar meter replenishes during play
progression.unlock_mechanism: Game progresses through film narrative: cub Simba → adult Simba, with ability changes (cub jumps on enemies, adult gains combat moves). Hidden bugs in specific levels unlock bonus stages
replayability_hooks: Hidden bugs trigger bonus stages with Timon and Pumbaa for extra lives/continues
Difficulty settings affect starting lives and resource availability
Permanent meter extensions encourage thorough exploration on replays
Continues system allows restart from last stage rather than title, enabling stage-based practice

world_building_techniques: Level design based directly on film scenes (Hakuna Matata, Be Prepared, Can't Wait to be King)
Sprite animation by Disney Feature Animation staff preserves film's visual identity
Music adapted from film's orchestration and songs
Mechanic changes reflect narrative: cub abilities → adult abilities mirror Simba's maturation
Boss encounter with Scar mirrors film's climactic confrontation

boss_design.philosophy: Single confrontation with narrative antagonist (Scar) serves as game's climax; framed as culmination of Simba's journey to adulthood and reclamation of pride
notable_bosses: Scar (final boss) - battle as adult Simba with full combat moveset

faction_indicators: Pride Rock (Simba's homeland, symbolic of rightful order)
danger_signals: Scar's rule represents usurpation and corruption
Environmental decay in later levels reflects Scar's mismanagement
environmental_storytelling: Progression through distinct Lion King locations establishes geography of conflict
Level hazards intensify as player nears confrontation with Scar
Timon and Pumbaa's bonus stages provide comic relief mirroring film's 'Hakuna Matata' subplot
